name: EOLL
description: Edge Orientation of the Last Layer — 3 cases. Orient all 4 last-layer edges so yellow faces up. After this step you have a yellow cross on top. Used as step 1 of 2-look OLL.

algorithms.name: Dot (No Edges Oriented)
algorithms.notation: F R U R' U' F' U2 F U R U' R' F'

alternatives.notation: F R U R' U' F' f R U R' U' f'
alternatives.note: Line then L-shape — easy to remember

algorithms.setup: No edges are oriented (no yellow on top face edges). Apply Line alg to get L-shape, then L-shape alg to get Cross. Or use this single algorithm from any angle.

algorithms.name: L-Shape (2 Adjacent Edges)
algorithms.notation: F U R U' R' F'
algorithms.setup: Two adjacent edges are oriented, forming an L-shape. Hold the L so the two oriented edges point to the back and to the left (9 o'clock position).

algorithms.name: Line (2 Opposite Edges)
algorithms.notation: F R U R' U' F'
algorithms.setup: Two opposite edges are oriented, forming a horizontal line. Hold the line horizontal (left to right).
